content:
Like inflating or deflating stuff? Do it in Roc! https://github.com/niclas-ahden/roc-deflate

I've been working on this for quite some time, and it's been a ton of fun learning, but please temper your expectations of perf/size at this point :sweat_smile: I'll let Claude take the wheel later and it'll shatter my puny attempts in a heartbeat (this is what it's made for!) so we'll probably get a juicy update to this!

Here's how it's currently doing: https://github.com/niclas-ahden/roc-deflate#choosing-a-level
